user.title: Add Tuya E-Board
user.description: Power your board on (turn the remote on so it's awake) and bring it within Bluetooth range of Home Assistant, then start the scan. The board sleeps when idle, so it's only discoverable while it's on.

no_bluetooth.title: No Bluetooth adapter
no_bluetooth.description: Home Assistant has no Bluetooth adapter available, so it can't scan. Connect a Bluetooth adapter, run Home Assistant on hardware that has one, or add an ESPHome Bluetooth Proxy — then try again.

no_devices.title: No board found
no_devices.description: Bluetooth is working, but no Tuya e-board was advertising. Make sure the board is powered on (remote awake) and in Bluetooth range, then scan again.

pick.title: Select board
pick.description: Choose the discovered board to add.

choose_auth.title: Add {name}
choose_auth.description: How should Home Assistant get this board's Tuya local key? Cloud login fetches it for you from your Tuya IoT project. Manual entry is for advanced users who already have the key.

cloud.title: Tuya cloud login
cloud.description: Enter your Tuya IoT Platform project credentials. Home Assistant lists the devices in your project and pulls this board's local key automatically. See the Home Assistant 'Tuya' integration docs for how to create a project and get these values.

data_description.access_id: From your Tuya IoT Platform cloud project (Authorization Key).
data_description.access_secret: The matching secret for the project.
data_description.region: The data center your Tuya/Smart Life account is registered in.

cloud_pick.title: Select your board
cloud_pick.description: Couldn't match the board by MAC automatically — pick it from your Tuya account's devices.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate {name}
reauth_confirm.description: This board's local key changed — usually after re-pairing it in the Tuya app. Confirm your Tuya cloud credentials and Home Assistant will fetch the new key automatically.

credentials.title: Manual credentials for {name}
credentials.description: Enter the Tuya local key for this board (e.g. from `tinytuya wizard`). The values are verified by a one-time connect and read.

data_description.local_key: The device's local key from devices.json / the Tuya IoT cloud. Re-pairing the board rotates it.
data_description.product_id: Selects the per-product DP map (units/scales). Leave blank to use defaults.

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the board. Make sure it's powered on with the remote awake and in Bluetooth range, then try again.
error.invalid_auth: Connected, but the handshake failed — the local key is likely wrong or stale (re-pairing the board rotates it). Re-run `tinytuya wizard` and re-enter it.
error.invalid_cloud_auth: Tuya cloud login failed. Check the Access ID, Access Secret, and region.
error.cloud_cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the Tuya cloud. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.cloud_no_devices: No devices found in this Tuya project. Make sure your Smart Life / Tuya app account is linked to the project.

abort.no_devices_found: No Tuya e-board found advertising. Power the board on (remote awake) and in range, then retry.
abort.reauth_successful: Re-authentication successful — the local key was refreshed.
